summary: Wired MCP servers settings tab and plugins settings to the real Rust backend. Rust: Added GET /api/mcp (list_mcp_servers), POST /api/mcp/reload, POST /api/mcp/servers/{name}/enable, POST /api/mcp/servers/{name}/disable, and GET /api/plugins endpoints to api.rs; registered all routes in mod.rs; exported McpServerStatus from ava_agent::stack so callers can match on it. Frontend: SettingsModal.tsx now fetches live MCP server data via rustBackend.listMcpServers() when the MCP tab is opened, with status mapping from backend enum values (connected/disabled/failed/connecting) to MCPServer status union; falls back to local settings when backend is unreachable. Added handleRefreshMcp that re-fetches on user click. Added InstalledPluginInfo type to rust-ipc.ts, rustBackend.listInstalledPlugins() to rust-bridge.ts, and api-client.ts route mappings for all new endpoints. The PluginsTab already uses usePlugins() which calls loadPluginsState() (power plugins via ava-plugin) - that store is already wired to the Rust backend via rustPlugins commands; the plugin catalog list (PLUGIN_CATALOG) is the marketplace/discovery catalog which is separate from installed power plugins.
